reason: Extreme Sentiment Detected (Score: 10/10): The report of an Iranian attack on Qatari LNG infrastructure constitutes a catastrophic geopolitical event. As Qatar is a primary global exporter, a threat to its long-term export capacity would trigger extreme market panic and a massive surge in natural gas prices due to severe supply disruption fears.

payload.summary: The report of an Iranian attack on Qatari LNG infrastructure constitutes a catastrophic geopolitical event. As Qatar is a primary global exporter, a threat to its long-term export capacity would trigger extreme market panic and a massive surge in natural gas prices due to severe supply disruption fears.
